center.name: 納塔爾省
center.summary: 納塔爾省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Rufous-cheeked nightjar，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The rufous-cheeked nightjar can be found in Southern Africa year-round, it can be found in Angola, Zambia, Botswana, Mozambique, Namibia, Zimbabwe, and South Africa, although it is absent from the east coast of Southern Africa, Natal, and west Namibia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The rufous-cheeked nightjar can be found in Southern Africa year-round, it can be found in Angola, Zambia, Botswana, Mozambique, Namibia, Zimbabwe, and South Africa, although it is absent from the east coast of Southern Africa, Natal, and west Namibia
